title: Angular AI Config File Options Schema
description: Generates AI configuration files for Angular projects. This schematic creates AGENTS.md file and Angular MCP server configuration, improving the quality of AI-generated code and suggestions.

x-prompt.message: Which AI tools should Angular integrate with? https://angular.dev/ai/develop-with-ai

items.label: Claude Code   [ `AGENTS.md` + Angular MCP server config ]
Gemini CLI    [ `GEMINI.md` + Angular MCP server config ]
Open AI Codex [ `AGENTS.md` + Angular MCP server config ]

tool.description: Specifies which AI tools to generate configuration files (AGENTS.md, MCP server config) for.
